memoryArtifacts.headline: Morton Castle
memoryArtifacts.description: Morton Castle is located by an artificial loch in the hills above Nithsdale, in Dumfries and Galloway, south-west Scotland. It lies 2.5 miles north-east of Thornhill, and once formed part of a chain of castles along the strategically important Nith Valley, which runs from the Solway Firth north to the Clyde Valley.
memoryArtifacts.place: Thornhill, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom

zh.lifeSummary: 當James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas於1426年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓時，他的父親James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith31歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Gifford34歲。他於1459年5月15日與Princess Joan Stewart在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年10月20日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas于1426年出生在苏格兰度福利爾莫頓时，他的父亲James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith31岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Gifford34岁。他于1459年5月15日与Princess Joan Stewart在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年10月20日在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas was born in 1426, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, was 31 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, was 34. He married Princess Joan Stewart on 15 May 1459, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 October 1498, in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.Thornhill, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: Thornhill, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas est né en 1426, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Princess Joan Stewart le 15 mai 1459, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1498, à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas 1426 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith 31 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Gifford 34. Er hat am 15. Mai 1459 in Schottland, United Kingdom Princess Joan Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1498 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas è nato il nel 1426 nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Princess Joan Stewart il 15 maggio 1459, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas(이)가 1426년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Gifford(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1459년 5월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Princess Joan Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 10월 20일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas nasceu em 1426, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Princess Joan Stewart em 15 de maio de 1459, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1498, em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.Thornhill, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: таурнилл, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas родился в 1426 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Gifford, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess Joan Stewart 15 мая 1459 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 20 октября 1498 г. в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas nació en 1426, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Gifford, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Princess Joan Stewart el 15 de mayo de 1459, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1498, en Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.
